final:
module RefModule (
        input q,
        input r,
        input s,
  wire temp1_( ~q & ~r & ~s ) |
           ( ~q & ~r & s ) |
           ( ~q & r & s ) = ( ~q & ~r & ~s ) |
           ( ~q & ~r & s ) |
           ( ~q & r & s );
  wire temp2_( q & r & s ) = ( q & r & s );
  assign t = temp1_( ~q & ~r & ~s ) |
           ( ~q & ~r & s ) |
           ( ~q & r & s ) | temp2_( q & r & s ) ;

endmodule
